## Type of Change
- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] docs: documentation
- [ ] refactor: code refactor
- [ ] test: adding tests
- [ ] chore: maintenance

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Linter passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Manually tested in browser
